context: =  uriniferous perirenal pseudocyst ← tear in collecting system with continued renal function Etiology: Path:   fibroblastic cavity (in 5-12 days), dense connective tissue encapsulation (in 3-6 weeks) Location: √  cystic mass in perirenal space = localized perirenal urinoma (most common) √  cystic mass filling entire perirenal space = diffuse perirenal urinoma √  sickle-shaped collection = subcapsular urinoma √  encapsulated expanding intrarenal cystic mass separating renal tissue fragments = intrarenal urinoma Plain radiography: √  soft-tissue mass obliterating retroperitoneal structures √  s
